title: rubus × hylophiloides
intro: Rubus × hylophiloides, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × hylophiloides include its ability to support digestive health, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
